events.name: EV002
events.note: 队友在任务中错放物品

parameters: Hey there! A new face, huh? Just get into town?

The name's Leo. I'd love to play host and show you around, but right now. I'm in a huge rush to take care of something, so my hands are completely tied. Since we crossed paths, though, could you do me a quick solid?
I left my cactus back in the office, and I really need it. Mind grabbing it for me?
It's the very last building up ahead. As for where the cactus is...Uh, you can't miss it once you walk in. Just bring it over, alright? Thanks a ton, I'll grab you a cold drink later!
Side Quest Accepted: [Help Leo Find His Cactus]
Huh? Turned me down just like that? Come on, kid, don't be so cold.
Look, this place isn't huge, but it's definitely not tiny either. You're new here, so you're gonna need my help sooner or later.
I'm really in a massive pinch right now. Long story short, you're helping me out with this cactus today whether you like it or not.
Side Quest Accepted: [Help Leo Find His Cactus]
Hey! Watch where you're going! Out of the way, maphead! If you make my delivery late, can you even afford to pay for it?!
Oh. Last I checked, you don't own the road. I suggest you go learn some manners first.
Observe the two closely. Who appears to be on the verge of snapping?
Please enter the reason for your choice.

Who do you believe is actually controlling the situation?
Cut the fancy talk! You newspaper folks write nothing but garbage anyway! You must've stolen my delivery slip! Now, pull this cart back to the shop right this second, that's an order!
Pushing a cart? That's manual labor. I only do the brainwork, high-IQ stuff. As for your delivery slip...
Hasn't it been sticking out of your back pocket this whole time?  With a memory like that, it's a miracle your weapons shop makes any money at all.
Determine whether either of their psychological defense mechanisms has shaken.
question: "心理防御机制有没有动摇",

How do you think their conversation will play out?
Shut up! Just shut up, you pathetic hack! What do you know about real honest work?! I'm so ticked off! Get lost!!
Loud voice. Too bad it's just impotent rage.
We should get moving before someone tries to charge you a toll for blocking his way.
\N[1]! Where the hell have you been?! I've been waiting forever!
Where's my stuff? Don't tell me you showed up empty-handed!
And you are...? Do I know you?
Huh?! Did you get kicked in the head or something?!
Where's that blue outfit I told you to grab from my place last time?
...Wait, where did I leave it again? Whatever, just go get it, and make it snappy!
What's taking you so long? The weapons shop needs to open!
Cut the chatter. Go do it now, this very second!
Ah, so he's the weapons shop owner. Perfect chance to go to his place and run a scan.
Side Quest Accepted: [Help Panes Find His Clothes]
Finally brought it? ...Wait, did I even tell you to grab this one?
Ugh, whatever! At least you finally used your brain for once. Man, you were driving me crazy!
Congrats on helping Panes get his clothes!
How would you characterize Panes' behavior?
It makes me tolerate his rudeness.
It gives me a chance to scan his place.
It'll help me handle him better next time.
I don't really feel anything about it.
It makes me tolerate his rudeness.
It gives me a chance to scan his place.
answer: "让我有机会去他家扫描",
It'll help me handle him better next time.
answer: "下次能够让我更好的面对他",
I don't really feel anything about it.
Please look closely. Do you think the following statement is an objective description?

When \N[1] first met Panes, he pointed out that \N[1] arrived later than he expected. He claimed that \N[1] was supposed to help get his blue clothes. After \N[1] went to the other room and retrieved them, \N[1] handed them to him.
Please repeat that back to me.

That was excellent! I love it.
A storm is rolling in! Go take cover at the inn, it's the building on the far right with 'INN' written on it.
Isn't that Lurib and Panes? What are they doing here?
What are you doing in front of my house?
Hey, kiddo! Want some BBQ? Look at you, you're skinny as a rail!
What... what are you even doing here...
I'm not hungry. Just mind your own business and eat.
This is already the third time Dofeng has found his adventurer sister, Dioem, who ran away from home long ago, grilling meat right outside his door. Every time, it
smells incredible. But he still refuses. Should Dioem keep pressing Dofeng to have some BBQ?
Yes, maybe Dofeng is just being shy and defensive. She should keep pushing.
No, if he's going to be ungrateful, then forget it.
Yes, maybe Dofeng is just being shy and defensive. She should keep pushing.
question: "要不要继续询问已经被拒绝的烤肉",
No, if he's going to be ungrateful, then forget it.

Stop beating around the bush! Who goes out to make a living without getting their share? From now on, I’ve got your back. If anyone dares to mess with you, just tell me what you want to eat! I’ll get it for you.
Protecting me? Don't act so high and mighty! What do you know?! You're so amazing, of course everyone likes you.
You have no idea what bullying really is
You have no idea what it feels like to be hated by everyone and treated like trash by your teachers!
Dofeng suddenly flew into a rage. Was his anger due to his hatred of Dioem, or was there another reason?
Dofeng didn't run away; he was a bit overwhelmed, and maybe he was actually scared.
Dofeng doesn't like Dioem, so Dioem decides to go back angrily.
Dofeng didn't run away; he was a bit overwhelmed, and maybe he was actually scared.
question: "Dofeng突然大发雷霆。他的愤怒是因为讨厌Dioem，还是有别的原因",
